source.licence: Open Government Licence v2, per London Datastore page
source.source_limit: The table is a low-carbon generators dataset that includes LFEPA/LFB fire-station addresses and postcodes. It is used as a public address list, not as a live operational station master list.

geocoder.method: postcode centroid lookup; terminated_postcodes alternate lookup for retired postcodes

honesty_note: Use as straight-line proximity/accessibility context only. Do not describe as coverage, routing-grade travel time, dispatch, relocation, or optimisation evidence.
